docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.44 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMONON, HORACE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMONON, HORACE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMONON, HORACE SERVED JUL-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMONON, HORACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3547 20TH STREET, 3RD FLOOR ROOM 8, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HUNKIN, FOLAU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT HUNKIN, FOLAU
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HUNKEN, FALAO
